CMS Chronic Conditions Data Warehouse (CCW) Data Dictionary
Medicare Part D Beneficiary Plan Election File
Version 1.2 (April 2018)
Long SAS NAME Label Type Length
BENE_ID CCW Beneficiary ID CHAR 15
REF_YEAR Year of Part D Election Flag NUM 4
APLCTN_DT Beneficiary Part D Plan Enrollment Application Date DATE 8
ENRLMT_EFCTV_DT Beneficiary Part D Plan Enrollment Effective Date DATE 8
DISENRLMT_DT Beneficiary Part D Plan Disenrollment Date DATE 8
ENRLMT_TYPE_CD Part D Enrollment Type Code CHAR
